metadata.title: Your Datacenter — Enterprise Colocation
metadata.description: Plan your rack space and power requirements with our interactive datacenter configurator.

hero.title: Reliable infrastructure for your critical workloads
hero.subtitle: Plan your colocation footprint with precision. Configure rack units and power budgets using interactive sliders.

features.title: Why choose us
features.subtitle: Built for mission-critical operations with redundancy at every layer.

power.title: Redundant Power
power.description: Dual power feeds with N+1 UPS and generator backup for uninterrupted operations.

connectivity.title: Premium Connectivity
connectivity.description: Carrier-neutral facility with low-latency cross-connects and diverse fiber paths.

security.title: Physical Security
security.description: 24/7 on-site staff, biometric access control, and CCTV monitoring throughout.

support.title: 24/7 Operations
support.description: Remote hands support and proactive monitoring around the clock.

cta.title: Ready to plan your deployment?
cta.subtitle: Use our visual rack builder to map out your equipment, U-space, and power requirements before you move in.

configure.title: Rack & Power Configurator
configure.subtitle: Use the sliders to configure your required rack units and power.

sliders.title: Configuration
sliders.hint: Set how many rack units and how much power you need
